title: Goose Expansion!
description: A mod that adds GEESE to Minecraft in an INTERESTING way.
body:
Note:

This mod started as a joke mod, a few years ago, but I've EXPANDED upon it ever since. I've also added quite a lot of things, so it will take a while for me to list everything here. If you have any questions, just ask in the Discord. :)

Mod dedicated to [@thatgoosegoose | Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/thatgoosegoose)

<details>
<summary>Summary</summary>

This mods adds alien Geese, who are EXPANDING their colonies to earth. These Geese bring powerful materials to your planet. Defeat bossfights, tame new Goose-related creatures and become a GOD among MEN.

</details>

**Why Should You Get This❓**

Honestly just for a fun time. The mod is survival friendly and intergrates pretty well into Vanilla Minecraft.
I'd also recommend this mod to you if you are into kaiju, geese, amulets that give you powers, boss fights, structures, mystery, goofy mods, nukes, trophies, etc.

The mod has quite a vast variety of content.

The mod also has special events (updates) for special days, including: New Year, Valentine's Day, April Fools Day, Easter, Halloween, Christmas

**Contacting about any Bugs / Suggestions🔧**

The Following Link will lead you to a Discord Server, if you don't want to join, that's alright, but there may not be a different way to contact me :| Discord

**What It Adds🧪**

<details>
<summary>Bosses</summary>

<details>
<summary>Honkey The Mad Goose</summary>
  
![Honkey The Mad Goose (Stage 1)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30260e75239d7c20e461cbd6f4cda81e13b78caa.png)

Stage 1 | HP: 450 | Atp: ~10

Stage 2 | HP: 600 | Apt: N/A (all damage is done by minions and tnt)

**Encounter**

To first encounter Honkey, you have to find four of his tombs and walk into their crystals to retrieve parts of his soul. Once you got a piece of his soul, your crafting menu should unlock a recipe to the Honkey Shrine, which is used to ressurect the evil Goose.
(Honkey Tombs are found at y=-50 - y=-5, but are usually on the deeper side)

You also need to find a floating Shrine island for the recipe.
  
**Fight:**

Honkey is a very powerful boss with 2 stages and plenty health. He summons tons of minions and is very destructive. When fighting Honkey you need to remember to bring a ranged item and a ton of projectiles, because he ends up flying in his second stage.

**He drops the Ancient Goose Amulet upon death.**

</details>

<details>
<summary>Goosezilla</summary>
  
  ![Goosezilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa4a6a0ca70faa0ae3dea64f91e2fc2425350d6.png)

Goosezilla | HP: 1k | Apt: 30
  
**Encounter**

You have to first ressurect and raise a Goosaurus to adolencense and then Nuke it with a redstone powered Goose Nuke.

**Fight** 

I recommend that you run as far and fast (away from the crater) as possible and create a bunker where you can safely shoot Goosezilla from, as it is very powerful and destructive.

For your weapon of choice, I'd bring an upgraded bow with the Bane Of Anserem enchantment, as Goosezilla has a ton of health and a very fast reaction time, which could be the death of you if you cant take it down fast.

Once Goosezilla dies, it explodes in a nuclear explosion leaving nearby mobs on fire and a huge crater.

**It drops the Goose Beam Amulet upon death.**

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Entities</summary>

<details>
<summary>Goose</summary>

![An image of the basic Goose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b046317794ba79c33940830e2b68cae5bce506b.png)

Goose | HP: 10 | Atp: N/A

The Goose is a simple neutral creature that likes to swim around and doesn't do much. You can find it in: Beaches, Sunflower Plains, Cold Oceans, Rivers and Birch Forests.

Some reasons why you may want to find geese are that they drop Goose eggs, which will help you craft many items later on and they have some nametag eastereggs.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Goose Tomb Guard</summary>

![An image of a Goose Tomb Guardian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e6d51414faa4f04309b9b930c3b87aa56d72e6a.png)

Goose Tomb Guard | HP: 35 | Atp: 18

The Goose Tomb Guard is a guardian found at ancient Goose tombs such as Honkey's. When killed they drop pretty OP loot, which can include Soul Feathers, Golden Apples or Gold Ingots.

They kill anything that they think could be a threat to the tomb or is evil.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Goose Tomb Warrior</summary>

![An image of a Goose Tomb Warrior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0825324cbcb43a9a50910b7accad87e788fbd80e.png)

Goose Tomb Warrior | HP: 25 | Atp: 25

The Goose Tomb Warriors are foils to the Goose Tomb Guardians, summoned by Honkey himself, during the second stage of the boss fight.

These reversed Tomb Guardians deal more damage, but are much easier to kill and are guaranteed to drop a soul feather upon death.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Goosaurus</summary>

![An image of a Goosaurus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b57c75572e2177209e2f063718148ec105d8c586.png)

Juvenile | HP: 25 | Atp: 15

Adult | HP: 550 | Atp: 25
  
**Encounter:**

To first encounter a Goosaurus, you must craft a Goosaurus De-extinction Token (see "Other Items" for more information), using Goose eggs and a totem of undying. Once you've successfully ressurrected a Juvenile Goosaurus, you must keep it contained and wait until it grows up to a Goosaurus.
  
**Behaviour:**

The Goosaurus, in adolencense, is a hostile creature with

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>

<details>
<summary>Floating Shrine Island</summary>

Where:

The Floating Shrine Islands are important to anybody who wants to fight the Honkey boss, because you can find unpossessed shrines on them.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Honkey's Tomb</summary>

Where: In Taigas, Swamps and Mangrove Swamps, around the world at y=-50 - y=-5, but usually on the deeper side (They usually have ~7 chunks between each other)

Honkey's Tombs play a vital part in his resurrection. You need to find atleast four of them to gather enough pieces of Honkey's spirit to resurrect him. Inside of the Tombs you will find Goose Tomb Guardians and a crystal containing a piece of his soul.

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Weapons</summary>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Other Items</summary>

<details>
<summary>Soul Feather</summary>

There's a chance that the Tomb Guardian Geese drop these. These feathers give the player a short burst of regeneration, speed and dolphin's grace when consumed, but can also be used to resurrect Goose Spirits.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Goosaurus De-extinction Token</summary>

These tokens can be crafted using Geese eggs and a totem of undying. When used they usually ressurect an ancient Goosaurus back from the dead, although there is a rare chance that they fail and unleash evil Honkey-infected Geese and an infected Juvenile Goosaurus.

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Special Versions</summary>

<details>
<summary>Valentine's Day Edition</summary>

The Valentine's Day Edition of Goose Expansion primarily adds 2 new amulets that you can keep after the event and an advancement. All the other content is content that gets locked after the update and only returns in future Valentine's versions.

This content includes:

**Cluckster (the chicken that hates love)**
You can find his tombs around the Valentine's dimension, which is accessed by killing a Honkshroom, which rarily spawn in the Swamp biome. This tomb has two floors, the first being a floor with nothing and the second with a wall that you have to break through to get to Cluckster's shrine. Once you break through the wall, a bunch of silverfish will spawn, as the walls are all made of infested blocks. Make sure sure to quickly exit the building before the shrine blows up or the silverfish swarm you.

Fight:

Cluckster is a melee boss, who is immune to projectiles. The boss itself should be pretty easy to defeat if you have good armour though. His special moves are to summon Juvenile Goosaurus (don't attack you until they grow up) and to occasionally explode the area around him.

Once he dies, he drops the ancient Chicken Amulet, which allows you to summon Chicken Eggs every now and then, and the Love Amulet, which lets you heal and saturate yourself.

</details>
</details>
